landing.title: Crowquill — Tutoring Platform
landing.hero_subtitle: All-in-one platform for managing university tutoring: sections, attendance, LaTeX exercises, and an AI tutor that guides without giving answers.
landing.features_title: Everything you need to manage tutoring
landing.feature_sections_desc: Organize tutoring by period, course, and section. Assign tutors, control capacity, and manage enrollments.
landing.feature_exercises_desc: Create and publish exercises with math notation. Live editor with LaTeX preview.
landing.feature_attendance_desc: Record attendance per session with a single tap. Dashboard with stats for tutors and admins.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Intelligent assistant that guides students step by step, without giving the direct answer.
